title: Appointment of a receiver
doc_html:
§599.9. Appointment of a receiver

            The court may appoint an authority to serve as a receiver in a receivership proceeding filed by a local government.

            Acts 2025, No. 443, §1.
doc_text:
§599.9. Appointment of a receiver
The court may appoint an authority to serve as a receiver in a receivership proceeding
filed by a local government.
Acts 2025, No. 443, §1.
